title: Create a contract compliance packet
given: The tenant has supplier compliance documents, tariff contracts, RFQs, and transportation procurement recommendations.
when: A user opens /assistant/contract-compliance and selects Create compliance packet.
then: The assistant persists an AssistantContractCompliancePacket with obligations, renewal risks, document risks, compliance gaps, and an action plan.
The leadership summary explains the compliance score and major review items.
No supplier document, tariff contract, RFQ, booking, or message is modified automatically.

title: Queue obligations and renewals for review
given: A compliance packet contains expiring documents, renewal risks, or missing contract evidence.
when: The contract owner adds an approval note and selects Queue review.
then: An AssistantActionQueueItem is created with packet id and compliance score.
The packet moves to REVIEW_QUEUED and records approvedAt plus approvedByUserId.
Contract owners can approve concrete source-system updates separately.

title: Scope evidence to supplier, tariff, and RFQ grants
given: A user has only supplier document access or only tariff/RFQ access.
when: The workspace builds a live preview or packet.
then: Only sources visible to the user's grants are included in the packet.
Restricted contract evidence is excluded from sourceSummaryJson and packet detail.
The audit log records assistant-generated review work without leaking unauthorized evidence.
